# Generated Architecture Test Rules

This directory contains C# architecture test files generated by the ADE (Architectural Decision Enforcement) tool.

## WARNING: These files are auto-generated - Do NOT edit directly

## Source

These tests are generated from the `.rule` files in `docs/architecture-decision-log/`.

## Generation Process

The ADE tool compiles each `.rule` file into a C# test file using the `csharp` plugin:
- Input: ADR rule files (`*.rule`)
- Output: NUnit test files (`ADR_*_csharp.g.cs`)
- Framework: NetArchTest.Rules

## Files

| Generated File       | Source Rule | ADR                           |
| -------------------- | ----------- | ----------------------------- |
| ADR_0004_csharp.g.cs | 0004.rule   | Divide system into modules    |
| ADR_0005_csharp.g.cs | 0005.rule   | Single REST API module        |
| ADR_0006_csharp.g.cs | 0006.rule   | API facade pattern            |
| ADR_0009_csharp.g.cs | 0009.rule   | 2-layer CQRS for reads        |
| ADR_0010_csharp.g.cs | 0010.rule   | Clean Architecture            |
| ADR_0014_csharp.g.cs | 0014.rule   | Event-driven module isolation |
| ADR_0015_csharp.g.cs | 0015.rule   | In-memory event bus           |
| ADR_0016_csharp.g.cs | 0016.rule   | IoC container per module      |
| ADR_0017_csharp.g.cs | 0017.rule   | Architecture tests            |

## Manual Regeneration

To regenerate these files locally, use the provided script:

```powershell
# PowerShell
.\scripts\generate-arch-tests.ps1
```

```bash
# Bash
./scripts/generate-arch-tests.sh
```

Or manually:
```powershell
@('0004', '0005', '0006', '0009', '0010', '0014', '0015', '0016', '0017') | ForEach-Object { 
    ./ade.exe compile -i ".\docs\architecture-decision-log\$_.rule" -o ./rules -p csharp 
}
```

## CI/CD Integration

These tests are automatically regenerated in the GitHub Actions workflow (`.github/workflows/buildPipeline.yml`) before running the test suite.
